title: trade history

javascript:(function(){var j=prompt('JSON paste а¶Ха¶∞аІБа¶®:');if(!j)return;var d;try{d=JSON.parse(j)}catch(e){alert('Invalid JSON: '+e.message);return}var a=d.data||d;if(!Array.isArray(a)){alert('data array а¶®аІЗа¶З');return}var tokens=[...new Set(a.map(function(x){return(x.baseAsset||'').toUpperCase()}).filter(Boolean))];var token='';if(tokens.length>1){token=(prompt('а¶Па¶Ха¶Ња¶Іа¶ња¶Х token:
'+tokens.join(', ')+'

а¶ХаІЛа¶® token? (а¶Ца¶Ња¶≤а¶њ а¶ђа¶Њ а¶≠аІБа¶≤ а¶≤а¶ња¶Ца¶≤аІЗ а¶Єа¶ђ)%27)||%27%27).toUpperCase()}else{token=tokens[0]}var f=token&&tokens.includes(token)?a.filter(function(x){return(x.baseAsset||%27%27).toUpperCase()===token}):a;var isAll=!token||!tokens.includes(token);var lbl=isAll?%27а¶Єа¶ђ tokens (%27+tokens.join(%27, %27)+%27)%27:token+%27/USDT%27;var t=0,b=0,s=0,bf=0,sf=0,bc=0,sc=0,ids=new Set();f.forEach(function(x){var v=parseFloat(x.usdtAmount)||0;var fee=parseFloat(x.fee)||0;var p=parseFloat(x.price)||0;t+=v;x.side===%27BUY%27?(b+=v,bc++,bf+=fee*p):(s+=v,sc++,sf+=fee);if(x.orderId)ids.add(x.orderId)});alert(lbl+%27

TRADE COUNT
а¶ЃаІЛа¶Я: %27+f.length+%27 | BUY: %27+bc+%27 | SELL: %27+sc+%27
а¶ЃаІЛа¶Я: $%27+t.toFixed(2)+%27
BUY: $%27+b.toFixed(2)+%27 | SELL: $%27+s.toFixed(2)+%27

FEE

BUY fee: $%27+bf.toFixed(4)+%27 | SELL fee: $%27+sf.toFixed(4))})();

title: open all trade
url:
javascript:(function(){var j=prompt('JSON paste а¶Ха¶∞аІБа¶®:');if(!j)return;var d;try{d=JSON.parse(j)}catch(e){alert('Invalid JSON: '+e.message);return}var a=d.data||d;if(!Array.isArray(a)){alert('data array а¶®аІЗа¶З');return}var tokens=[...new Set(a.map(function(x){return(x.baseAsset||'').toUpperCase()}).filter(Boolean))];var token='';if(tokens.length>1){token=(prompt('а¶Па¶Ха¶Ња¶°а¶ња¶Х token:
'+tokens.join(', ')+'

а¶ХаІЛа¶® token? (%а¶Ца¶Ња¶≤а¶ња¶ђа¶Њ а¶≠а¶ђа¶≤ а¶≤а¶ња¶Ца¶≤аІЗ а¶Єа¶ђ)').toUpperCase())||''}else{token=tokens[0]}var f=token&&tokens.includes(token)?a.filter(function(x){return(x.baseAsset||'').toUpperCase()===token}):a;var isAll=!token||!tokens.includes(token);var lbl=isAll?'а¶Єа¶ђ tokens ('+tokens.join(', ')+')':token+'/USDT';var t=0,b=0,s=0,bf=0,sf=0,bc=0,sc=0,ids=new Set();f.forEach(function(x){var v=parseFloat(x.usdtAmount)||0;var fee=parseFloat(x.fee)||0;var p=parseFloat(x.price)||0;t+=v;x.side==='BUY'?(b+=v,bc++,bf+=fee*p):(s+=v,sc++,sf+=fee);if(x.orderId)ids.add(x.orderId)});alert(lbl+'

TRADE COUNT
а¶ЃаІЛа¶Я: '+f.length+' | BUY: '+bc+' | SELL: '+sc+'

BUY: $'+b.toFixed(2)+' | SELL: $'+s.toFixed(2)+'
